name: Comp vs PI Claims Draper UT

mainEntity.name: Workers comp vs personal injury claim for third-party injury in Draper?
mainEntity.text: Workers comp vs personal injury claim for third-party injury in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Workers comp: no-fault, covers medical/wages via employer insurer. Personal injury: sue at-fault party for pain/suffering, higher potential payout; both allowed in Utah.

suggestedAnswer.text: Draper injuries from vendors/drivers: comp first, then third-party suit. Employers claim lien on settlements. Compare: comp faster but limited; PI slower, fuller comp. Attorney manages both to avoid pitfalls.

description: Workers comp: no-fault, covers medical/wages via employer insurer. Personal injury: sue at-fault party for pain/suffering, higher potential payout; both allowed
